OUTCOME: REFUSED
PIPELINE: pipeline.foundation_inputs
STAGE: stage.10_feature_spec
REASON: inactive_stage: selected stage `stage.10_feature_spec` is not active in the persisted route: blocked by unresolved stage stage.06_project_context_interview (next)

NEXT SAFE ACTION: run `system pipeline resolve --id pipeline.foundation_inputs` and then retry `system pipeline compile --id pipeline.foundation_inputs --stage stage.10_feature_spec`
